Token intento 1 | status: 201 HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json Content-Length: 417 Connection: keep-alive Date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 14:59:09 GMT X-Amzn-Trace-Id: Root=1-69c7ecbd-36ab1a3654f8863564844c9c;Parent=1bb7e1417c5d2caa;Sampled=0;Lineage=1:9ee0f5ed:0 x-amzn-RequestId: 6f25c609-e0cf-4b0c-a983-0169b716472a Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Amz-Date, X-Api-Key, X-Amz-Security-Token x-amz-apigw-id: a8HtpFQ1oAMEBUQ= Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH X-Cache: Miss from cloudfront Via: 1.1 349199c2d4bce4eb0554ad238203d5e4.cloudfront.net (CloudFront) X-Amz-Cf-Pop: MIA3-P2 X-Amz-Cf-Id: V5Ewbo_C40z8FqkqUbrAJu92vkandgUtTsm_qOKVLG8RHCGo4GywHA==
[ { "id": 1, "name": "The Russian", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 3, "name": "The Vanishing Half", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 4, "name": "The Midnight Library", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 6, "name": "Viscount Who Loved Me", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 2, "name": "Just as I Am", "type": "non-fiction", "available": false }, { "id": 5, "name": "Untamed", "type": "non-fiction", "available": true } ] Token intento 1 | status: 201 HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json Content-Length: 417 Connection: keep-alive Date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 14:59:20 GMT X-Amzn-Trace-Id: Root=1-69c7ecc8-3af40ec43740422f1b034164;Parent=2b5c1030c6a6a6b8;Sampled=0;Lineage=1:9ee0f5ed:0 x-amzn-RequestId: cca8b3f5-082f-4fe4-8cea-e5712cd9c7c9 Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Amz-Date, X-Api-Key, X-Amz-Security-Token x-amz-apigw-id: a8HvUEVaIAMEhmQ= Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH X-Cache: Miss from cloudfront Via: 1.1 fe16c80658be143c81fdffc7cbf895ae.cloudfront.net (CloudFront) X-Amz-Cf-Pop: MIA3-P2 X-Amz-Cf-Id: QbxCxUi3W1CC1_3HlomqjZKJzOaDlAdbbMEalXph3NudhsItgqn3Zg==
